did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning. It employed a classical mathematical method (box-counting algorithm) to calculate fractal dimensions from dermoscopic images and used statistical analysis (t-test) to compare these features between melanoma and benign nevus groups. While it mentions computer-aided diagnosis in the introduction as a general context, the actual methodology relies on manual image preprocessing and deterministic fractal geometry calculations, not computational modeling or AI.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
